name: Scrambled Eggs (Mf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add salt, pepper, and chopped chives to the beaten eggs.
2. In a small skillet, melt butter over low heat until foaming subsides.
3. Slowly add the egg mixture to the skillet, stirring continuously over very low heat.
4. Cook until the eggs form into a soft, creamy mass.
5. Remove from heat and continue stirring until silky, velvet-textured curds are formed.
6. Serve immediately.
Yield: 1 serving
